name: The Gold Bug
description_short: Gold Bug Pawn Shop buys and lends against gold, jewelry, and other collateral at their Kendall, Florida location. Quick access to cash without credit checks.
description_long: Gold Bug Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn operation located at 9806 S Dixie Highway in Kendall, Florida, serving the Miami-Dade County area. The shop has established itself as a collateral-based lending option in a retail-dense neighborhood near Dadeland Mall and major shopping centers. Pawn shops like Gold Bug provide immediate cash loans secured by personal items of value—typically jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and collectibles—without requiring credit checks or income verification. The business model allows customers to either sell items outright or use them as collateral for short-term loans, with the option to reclaim items by repaying the loan plus interest and fees within a specified period. Gold Bug distinguishes itself through convenient weekday hours (10:30 AM–6:00 PM Monday through Friday), customer-friendly amenities including air conditioning and parking, and acceptance of credit card payments alongside cash transactions. The shop's proximity to major retail, medical, and transit hubs makes it accessible to a broad customer base. As with all pawn shops, borrowers should understand that failure to repay results in loss of the collateral item, and pawn loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional bank loans. Gold Bug represents a legitimate but expensive source of emergency cash best suited for customers who have immediate funding needs and own valuable items they can temporarily part with.
pros: Open weekdays with consistent 10:30 AM–6:00 PM hours for working customers
No credit check or income verification required to borrow
Accepts credit card payments in addition to cash
Located in accessible retail area near Dadeland with Metrorail nearby
Phone line available for customer inquiries
cons: Website content does not disclose interest rates, fees, or loan terms—critical pricing information is absent
No information about loan duration, repayment terms, or what happens to unredeemed items
Limited hours (closed evenings and weekends) may not suit customers needing emergency weekend access
Pawn loans inherently carry high interest rates and risk permanent loss of collateral if unable to repay
Website is a Waze map listing rather than an independent business site, limiting transparency about policies and services
best_for: Customers with immediate cash needs and valuable items they can temporarily pledge as collateral
People without access to traditional credit or those unable to qualify for bank loans
Individuals selling jewelry, gold, or collectibles for quick cash
Short-term borrowers who can reliably reclaim their items within the loan period
diagnosis: Gold Bug Pawn Shop is best for customers facing immediate cash needs who own valuable items they can pledge as collateral. The critical caveat is that interest rates and fee structures are not disclosed on available materials, and pawn loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional lending—borrowers should verify exact terms before pledging items, as failure to repay results in permanent loss of the collateral.
services: Collateral-based short-term loans using jewelry and valuables
Jewelry sales or purchase as collateral
